name: Weather-Aware Booking
description: Branches on weather-API forecast to offer reschedule vs. confirm.

args.body: Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental. The forecast looks rough on your visit day — totally optional, but we'd be happy to move you to a sunnier slot if that's easier. Reply YES and we'll find you a new time, or just ignore this and we'll see you as planned. No pressure either way!

args.subject: You're all set for your Bright Smile visit
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Your appointment with Bright Smile Dental is confirmed for {{bookingStartsAt}}. The weather looks clear, so no need to reschedule — just show up and we'll take care of the rest.

A few quick reminders:
• Free new-patient consultation, no pressure, no surprise fees.
• If anything changes on your end, just reply to this email and we'll sort it out.
• We use modern, painless tech — promise it's nothing like the dentist you remember.

Looking forward to meeting you,
The Bright Smile Dental team
